zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Bourgogne I於1220年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 斯塔恩格安德斯時，她的父親Otto I Duke of Merania40歲，母親Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund28歲。她和Hughes de Chalons至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1279年3月8日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福艾維安勒-白斯享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide de Bourgogne I于1220年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 斯塔恩格安德斯时，她的父亲Otto I Duke of Merania40岁，母亲Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund28岁。她和Hughes de Chalons至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1279年3月8日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福艾維安勒-白斯享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Bourgogne I was born in 1220, in Andechs, Starnberg, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Otto I Duke of Merania, was 40 and her mother, Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund, was 28. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Hughes de Chalons. She died on 8 March 1279, in Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Bourgogne I est née en 1220, à Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Otto I Duke of Merania, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Hughes de Chalons. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1279, à Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Bourgogne I 1220 in Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I Duke of Merania 40 und ihre Mutter Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund 28. Sie hatte mit Hughes de Chalons mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. März 1279 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Bourgogne I è nata il nel 1220 nel Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Otto I Duke of Merania, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Hughes de Chalons. Morì il 8 marzo 1279, nel Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Bourgogne Iが1220年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス スターンバーグアンデチスで生まれた時，父Otto I Duke of Meraniaは40歳，母Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgundは28歳であった。彼女はHughes de Chalonsとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1279年3月8日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-サボイeヴィアン-レス-ベインスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Bourgogne I(이)가 1220년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 스타른버그 앤데크스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I Duke of Merania(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Hughes de Chalons(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 3월 8일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-사보이 e비누-레스-베이스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Bourgogne I nasceu em 1220, em Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto I Duke of Merania, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Hughes de Chalons. Ela faleceu em 8 de março de 1279, em Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Bourgogne I родилась в 1220 г. в местности андечс, ландкрис старнбирг, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto I Duke of Merania было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Hughes de Chalons. Она умерла 8 марта 1279 г. в местности eвян-лес-беинс, хауте-савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Bourgogne I nació en 1220, en Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Otto I Duke of Merania, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Beatrix von Hohenstaufen ,Erbin der Pfalzgrafschaft Burgund, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Hughes de Chalons. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1279, en Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
